channel.title: Releases on Drupal WxT
channel.description: Recent content in Releases on Drupal WxT

item.title: Releases
item.description: Important Expect security releases to appear here within 24 hours of being reported upstream. Release Created Date Description 2.2.16 2019-03-22T01:21:09Z Security update: Update core to 8.6.13 SA-CORE-2019-004 Features/Updates: Update Lightning to 3.2.7 Update entityqueue to 1.0-alpha8 Update menu_breadcrumb to 1.8 Update paragraphs to 1.7 Update wxt_bootstrap to 1.8 Resolve issues with container class logic in regions 2.

item.title: Releases
item.description: Important Releases will soon start to appear for Drupal 8 once stable releases are made. Release Created Date Description 2.2.16 2019-03-22T01:21:09Z Security update: Update core to 8.6.13 SA-CORE-2019-004 Features/Updates: Update Lightning to 3.2.7 Update entityqueue to 1.0-alpha8 Update menu_breadcrumb to 1.8 Update paragraphs to 1.7 Update wxt_bootstrap to 1.8 Resolve issues with container class logic in regions 2.
